summary: Completed comprehensive testing of e-commerce platform. Backend APIs mostly functional with some critical MongoDB ObjectId serialization issues. Frontend UI working well with successful admin authentication and dashboard access.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue
critical_bugs.error_details: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue
critical_bugs.error_details: Same ObjectId serialization error as categories

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks cart functionality for all users
critical_bugs.error_details: Same ObjectId serialization error affecting cart operations

integration_issues.issue: Cart operations fail due to backend 500 errors

missing_features.issue: No clear 'Products' navigation link found in main menu
Register link not easily accessible from login page

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero carousel and promotions
Admin dashboard stats display (Revenue: $0.00, Orders: 0, Products: 1, Users: 2)
Admin sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Products, Orders sections)
Product listing and featured products display
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization issues in FastAPI responses. The backend is returning ObjectId objects that cannot be JSON serialized, causing 500 errors in cart, category creation, and product creation endpoints. This affects core e-commerce functionality.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (UI loads well, admin works, but cart functionality blocked by backend issues)
